backend.setupInstructions:
1. Add test project: dotnet new xunit -n FloatingAICopilot.Tests
2. Add Moq NuGet package: dotnet add package Moq
3. Reference main project: dotnet add reference ../FloatingAICopilot.csproj

currentTestGaps: No unit tPRIORITY: Create WeatherForecastControllerTests with 3 test cases: Valid request, Empty data, Error handling
currentTestGaps.frontend: PRIORITY: Create AppComponent.spec.ts testing: component initialization, httpClient call, data binding
currentTestGaps.coverage: Target minimum 70% coverage for critical paths (controller/service logic)
currentTestGaps.nextPhase: Add integration tests and E2E tests when services layer is implemented

bestPractices.naming: Test names should read like documentation
bestPractices.oneAssertion: One logical assertion per test (multiple related assertions OK)

recommendations.backend: Add unit tests for controllers and models
recommendations.frontend: Create spec files for existing components (AppComponent.spec.ts)
